title: Pass m_unresolvedClass to the outer dot expr only if it exists

features.name: class extending type parameter
features.description: Code should include a class that extends a type given as a parameter
features.snippet: class uvm_port_base #(type T=Cls) extends T; endclass

features.name: associative array member in class
features.description: Code should include an associative array member declared inside a class with string key type

features.name: associative array select in method
features.description: Code should include a method that accesses an associative array member using a string key expression
features.snippet: function void set(string s, int x); m_dict[s] = x; endfunction
